data.title: Cohu To Announce First Quarter Financial Results on April 30
data.description: Cohu, Inc. (NASDAQ: COHU), a leading global provider of equipment and services for enhancing semiconductor manufacturing efficiency, is set to announce its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 on Thursday, April 30, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT/4:00 p.m. ET. Following the release, the Company will conduct a live conference call and webcast presentation at 1:30 p.m. PT/4:30 p.m. ET to delve into the results. Those interested can tune in to the live webcast.

data.title: Simplify Healthcare®, Sagility, and Convey Health Solutions Announce Strategic Alliance to Launch Sagility Synchrony
data.description: In Aurora, Illinois, Simplify Healthcare®, part of the Simplify Group™ and a prominent player in healthcare payer technology, revealed a new collaboration today. The company has partnered with Sagility and Convey Health Solutions (Convey) to introduce Sagility Synchrony. This innovative solution is specifically designed for Medicare Advantage, offering a comprehensive end-to-end lifecycle solution. Sagility Synchrony aims to eliminate disparate point solutions by providing a cohesive managed services model led by Sagility. This model is bolstered by integrated platforms that cover various aspects including plan design.
CarParts.com Sets First Quarter 2026 Conference Call for Thursday, May 7, 2026

data.title: TerrAscend Appoints Eric Jackson as Chief Financial Officer
data.description: On April 16, 2026, TerrAscend Corp. (TSX: TSND) (OTCQX: TSNDF), a prominent cannabis company in North America, revealed the selection of Eric Jackson as their new Chief Financial Officer ("CFO"). Jackson is set to assume the role on April 27, 2026.

data.title: Lakeland Fire + Safety discloses financial results for Q4 and FY 2026.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to 4.6%, the lowest it has been in the past decade. This decline in unemployment is attributed to the addition of 431,000 jobs in the month of June alone. Additionally, the labor force participation rate saw an increase to 63.1%, indicating more people are actively seeking employment. The strong job market and economic recovery have also contributed to a rise in consumer spending, which has seen a growth of 2.3% in the last quarter. These positive indicators suggest a promising outlook for the US economy in the coming months.

data.title: BANCFIRST CORPORATION REPORTS FIRST QUARTER EARNINGS
data.description: In Oklahoma City on April 16, 2026, BancFirst Corporation (NASDAQ GS:BANF) disclosed a net income figure of $63.0 million, translating to $1.85 per diluted share, for the initial quarter of 2026. This shows an increase from the $56.1 million in net income, or $1.66 per diluted share, reported in the first quarter of 2025.

data.title: EyePoint Reports Inducement Grants Under NASDAQ Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: In Watertown, Massachusetts on April 16, 2026, EyePoint, Inc., listed on Nasdaq as EYPT, a company focusing on therapeutics for serious retinal diseases, revealed the granting of non-statutory stock options to new recruits as inducement awards. These stock options were provided outside the parameters of the Company's 2023 Long-Term Incentive Plan, complying with NASDAQ Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: Wisconsin Electric declares quarterly dividends
data.description: In Milwaukee on April 16, 2026, the board of directors of Wisconsin Electric announced a quarterly cash dividend of 90 cents per share for the company's Preferred Stock, 3.60% Series. This dividend will be paid on June 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 14, 2026.

data.title: OceanPal Inc. Regains Nasdaq Compliance
data.description: Nasdaq has recognized OceanPal as a qualified listed company, with the company set to advance its NEAR Treasury strategy and boost commercial ecosystem adoption. Based in Athens, Greece and New York, the announcement was made on April 16, 2026. Under the ticker symbol NASDAQ: SVRN, OceanPal Inc. will continue its strategic efforts in these areas.

data.title: Asure Software to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on April 30, 2026
data.description: In Austin, Texas, on April 16, 2026, Asure Software, Inc. (Nasdaq: ASUR), a prominent supplier of cloud-based Human Capital Management software, disclosed plans for a conference call on Thursday, April 30, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. EST. The purpose of the call is to review the financial performance for the first quarter of 2026. Prior to the call, detailed financial results will be released through a press statement.

data.title: Capital Southwest Announces Preliminary Estimate of Fourth Quarter 2026 Operating Results and Earnings Release and Conference Call Schedule
data.description: On April 16, 2026, Capital Southwest Corporation ("Capital Southwest") (Nasdaq: CSWC), a business development company, shared its preliminary operating data for the fourth quarter of the 2026 fiscal year ending on March 31, 2026. Capital Southwest focuses on offering adaptable financial options to aid in the purchase and expansion of middle market enterprises. Additionally, they disclosed the details regarding their earnings release and conference call schedule for the fourth quarter of 2026.

data.title: Allogene Therapeutics Announces Closing of $200.4 Million Public Offering of Common Stock
data.description: Allogene Therapeutics, Inc. revealed the completion of its underwritten public offering of 87.5 million shares of common stock at $2.00 per share, resulting in gross proceeds of $200.4 million. The underwriters also acquired 12.7 million extra shares, increasing the total number of shares sold. After accounting for underwriting discounts, commissions, and related expenses, the company's aggregate earnings from the offering were disclosed.
